## Summary

- What changed and why?

## Checklist

- [ ] MVVM respected (no Views importing Services directly)
- [ ] ViewModels use DI via protocols (no default singletons)
- [ ] No `.shared` used outside composition root/previews
- [ ] Tests added/updated in `FIN1Tests/` for new/changed ViewModels
- [ ] Role-based navigation covered if affected
- [ ] Telemetry/lifecycle changes covered by tests if touched
